001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Dates;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.SupportedDevices;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmStatusV2Request;
013
014import java.time.Instant;
015
016/**
017 * Returns CGM (Continuous Glucose Monitor) status for Mobi pumps.
018 *
019 * Binary layout (20 bytes total):
020 *   offset 0  (1 byte):  sessionState          - CGMStatusBState ordinal
021 *   offset 1  (4 bytes): lastCalibrationTimestamp - uint32, pump epoch seconds
022 *   offset 5  (4 bytes): sensorStartedTimestamp   - uint32, pump epoch seconds
023 *   offset 9  (1 byte):  transmitterBatteryStatus - TransmitterBatteryStatus ordinal
024 *   offset 10 (4 bytes): sessionDuration          - uint32, seconds
025 *   offset 14 (4 bytes): sessionTimeRemaining     - uint32, seconds
026 *   offset 18 (1 byte):  cgmSensorType            - CGMSensorType ordinal
027 *   offset 19 (1 byte):  gracePeriod              - nonzero = true
028 */
029/**
030 * Returns CGM (Continuous Glucose Monitor) status for Mobi pumps.
031 *
032 * Binary layout (20 bytes total):
033 *   offset 0  (1 byte):  sessionState          - CGMStatusBState ordinal
034 *   offset 1  (4 bytes): lastCalibrationTimestamp - uint32, pump epoch seconds
035 *   offset 5  (4 bytes): sensorStartedTimestamp   - uint32, pump epoch seconds
036 *   offset 9  (1 byte):  transmitterBatteryStatus - TransmitterBatteryStatus ordinal
037 *   offset 10 (4 bytes): sessionDuration          - uint32, seconds
038 *   offset 14 (4 bytes): sessionTimeRemaining     - uint32, seconds
039 *   offset 18 (1 byte):  cgmSensorType            - CGMSensorType ordinal
040 *   offset 19 (1 byte):  gracePeriod              - nonzero = true
041 *
042
043 *
044 * <br>
045 *
046 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmStatusV2Request}, opCode -65, size 20
047 *
048 * <br>
049 *
050 * 
051 * <table border='1'>
052 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
053 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-65</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
054 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>20</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
055 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
056 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
057 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#MOBI_API_V3_5}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
058 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>supportedDevices</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.SupportedDevices#MOBI_ONLY}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
059 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CgmStatusV2Request}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
060 * </table>
061 */@MessageProps(
062    opCode=-65,
063    size=20,
064    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
065    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
066    minApi=KnownApiVersion.MOBI_API_V3_5,
067    supportedDevices=SupportedDevices.MOBI_ONLY,
068    request=CgmStatusV2Request.class
069)
070public class CgmStatusV2Response extends Message {
071
072    private int sessionStateId;
073    private SessionState sessionState;
074    private long lastCalibrationTimestamp;
075    private long sensorStartedTimestamp;
076    private int transmitterBatteryStatusId;
077    private TransmitterBatteryStatus transmitterBatteryStatus;
078    private long sessionDurationSeconds;
079    private long sessionTimeRemainingSeconds;
080    private int cgmSensorTypeId;
081    private CgmSensorType cgmSensorType;
082    private boolean gracePeriod;
083
084    public CgmStatusV2Response() {
085    }
086
087    public CgmStatusV2Response(
088            int sessionStateId,
089            long lastCalibrationTimestamp,
090            long sensorStartedTimestamp,
091            int transmitterBatteryStatusId,
092            long sessionDurationSeconds,
093            long sessionTimeRemainingSeconds,
094            int cgmSensorTypeId,
095            boolean gracePeriod) {
096        this.cargo = buildCargo(
097                sessionStateId,
098                lastCalibrationTimestamp,
099                sensorStartedTimestamp,
100                transmitterBatteryStatusId,
101                sessionDurationSeconds,
102                sessionTimeRemainingSeconds,
103                cgmSensorTypeId,
104                gracePeriod);
105        parse(this.cargo);
106    }
107
108    /**
109     * <table border="1">
110     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmStatusV2Response:</caption>
111     * <tr><td><code>sessionStateId</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
112     * <tr><td><code>sessionState</code></td><td><code>getSessionState()</code></td></tr>
113     * <tr><td><code>lastCalibrationTimestamp</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 1)</code></td></tr>
114     * <tr><td><code>sensorStartedTimestamp</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5)</code></td></tr>
115     * <tr><td><code>transmitterBatteryStatusId</code></td><td><code>raw[9] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
116     * <tr><td><code>transmitterBatteryStatus</code></td><td><code>getTransmitterBatteryStatus()</code></td></tr>
117     * <tr><td><code>sessionDurationSeconds</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10)</code></td></tr>
118     * <tr><td><code>sessionTimeRemainingSeconds</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 14)</code></td></tr>
119     * <tr><td><code>cgmSensorTypeId</code></td><td><code>raw[18] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
120     * <tr><td><code>cgmSensorType</code></td><td><code>getCgmSensorType()</code></td></tr>
121     * <tr><td><code>gracePeriod</code></td><td><code>(raw[19] &amp; 0xFF) != 0</code></td></tr>
122     * </table>
123     */
124    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
125        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
126        this.cargo = raw;
127        this.sessionStateId = raw[0] & 0xFF;
128        this.sessionState = getSessionState();
129        this.lastCalibrationTimestamp = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 1);
130        this.sensorStartedTimestamp = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5);
131        this.transmitterBatteryStatusId = raw[9] & 0xFF;
132        this.transmitterBatteryStatus = getTransmitterBatteryStatus();
133        this.sessionDurationSeconds = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10);
134        this.sessionTimeRemainingSeconds = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 14);
135        this.cgmSensorTypeId = raw[18] & 0xFF;
136        this.cgmSensorType = getCgmSensorType();
137        this.gracePeriod = (raw[19] & 0xFF) != 0;
138    }
139
140    /**
141     * <table border="1">
142     * <caption>Byte layout for CgmStatusV2Response.buildCargo(...):</caption>
143     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
144     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) sessionStateId</code></td></tr>
145     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
146     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
147     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
148     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
149     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
150     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
151     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
152     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
153     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>(byte) transmitterBatteryStatusId</code></td></tr>
154     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
155     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
156     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
157     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
158     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
159     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
160     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
161     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
162     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>(byte) cgmSensorTypeId</code></td></tr>
163     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>(byte) (gracePeriod ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
164     * </table>
165     */
166    public static byte[] buildCargo(
167            int sessionStateId,
168            long lastCalibrationTimestamp,
169            long sensorStartedTimestamp,
170            int transmitterBatteryStatusId,
171            long sessionDurationSeconds,
172            long sessionTimeRemainingSeconds,
173            int cgmSensorTypeId,
174            boolean gracePeriod) {
175        return Bytes.combine(
176                new byte[]{(byte) sessionStateId},
177                Bytes.toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp),
178                Bytes.toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp),
179                new byte[]{(byte) transmitterBatteryStatusId},
180                Bytes.toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds),
181                Bytes.toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds),
182                new byte[]{(byte) cgmSensorTypeId},
183                new byte[]{(byte) (gracePeriod ? 1 : 0)});
184    }
185
186    public int getSessionStateId() {
187        return sessionStateId;
188    }
189
190    /**
191     * @return the state of the CGM session
192     */
193    public SessionState getSessionState() {
194        return SessionState.fromId(sessionStateId);
195    }
196
197    /**
198     * CGM session states matching the Tandem app's CGMStatusBState enum ordinals.
199     */
200    public enum SessionState {
201        STATUS_STOPPED(0),
202        STATUS_START_PENDING(1),
203        SESSION_ACTIVE(2),
204        SESSION_STOP_PENDING(3),
205        UNKNOWN(4),
206        ;
207
208        private final int id;
209        SessionState(int id) {
210            this.id = id;
211        }
212
213        public static SessionState fromId(int id) {
214            for (SessionState s : values()) {
215                if (s.id == id) {
216                    return s;
217                }
218            }
219            return UNKNOWN;
220        }
221    }
222
223    public long getLastCalibrationTimestamp() {
224        return lastCalibrationTimestamp;
225    }
226
227    public Instant getLastCalibrationTimestampInstant() {
228        return Dates.fromJan12008EpochSecondsToDate(lastCalibrationTimestamp);
229    }
230
231    public long getSensorStartedTimestamp() {
232        return sensorStartedTimestamp;
233    }
234
235    public Instant getSensorStartedTimestampInstant() {
236        return Dates.fromJan12008EpochSecondsToDate(sensorStartedTimestamp);
237    }
238
239    public int getTransmitterBatteryStatusId() {
240        return transmitterBatteryStatusId;
241    }
242
243    /**
244     * @return the battery status of the CGM transmitter.
245     * Ordinals match the Tandem app's TransmitterBatteryStatus enum:
246     * 0=UNAVAILABLE, 1=ERROR, 2=EXPIRED, 3=OKAY, 4=OUT_OF_RANGE, 5=UNKNOWN
247     */
248    public TransmitterBatteryStatus getTransmitterBatteryStatus() {
249        return TransmitterBatteryStatus.fromId(transmitterBatteryStatusId);
250    }
251
252    /**
253     * TransmitterBatteryStatus ordinals match the Tandem app's enum, which differs slightly
254     * from the CGMStatusResponse variant (uses "OKAY" instead of "OK").
255     */
256    public enum TransmitterBatteryStatus {
257        UNAVAILABLE(0),
258        ERROR(1),
259        EXPIRED(2),
260        OKAY(3),
261        OUT_OF_RANGE(4),
262        UNKNOWN(5),
263        ;
264
265        private final int id;
266        TransmitterBatteryStatus(int id) {
267            this.id = id;
268        }
269
270        public static TransmitterBatteryStatus fromId(int id) {
271            for (TransmitterBatteryStatus s : values()) {
272                if (s.id == id) {
273                    return s;
274                }
275            }
276            return UNKNOWN;
277        }
278    }
279
280    /**
281     * @return the duration of the current CGM session, in seconds
282     */
283    public long getSessionDurationSeconds() {
284        return sessionDurationSeconds;
285    }
286
287    /**
288     * @return the time remaining in the current CGM session, in seconds
289     */
290    public long getSessionTimeRemainingSeconds() {
291        return sessionTimeRemainingSeconds;
292    }
293
294    public int getCgmSensorTypeId() {
295        return cgmSensorTypeId;
296    }
297
298    /**
299     * @return the type of CGM sensor in use
300     */
301    public CgmSensorType getCgmSensorType() {
302        return CgmSensorType.fromId(cgmSensorTypeId);
303    }
304
305    /**
306     * CGM sensor types matching the Tandem app's CGMSensorType enum ordinals.
307     */
308    public enum CgmSensorType {
309        NOT_APPLICABLE(0),
310        DEXCOM_G6(1),
311        FSL2(2),
312        DEXCOM_G7(3),
313        UNKNOWN(4),
314        ;
315
316        private final int id;
317        CgmSensorType(int id) {
318            this.id = id;
319        }
320
321        public static CgmSensorType fromId(int id) {
322            for (CgmSensorType s : values()) {
323                if (s.id == id) {
324                    return s;
325                }
326            }
327            return UNKNOWN;
328        }
329    }
330
331    /**
332     * @return true if the CGM session is in a grace period
333     */
334    public boolean isGracePeriod() {
335        return gracePeriod;
336    }
337}
